archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Soft Utility SaaS Variant

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. gap-6 between grid items.
layout.page_structure: Sidebar navigation (left, w-64) + Main content area. F-pattern scanning.
layout.dashboard_grid: bento grid: 12 columns. Left column (col-span-12 lg:col-span-8) for input sliders and forms. Right column (col-span-12 lg:col-span-4) for sticky 9-Box preview and summary.

components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] p-6
components.button_primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors
components.input: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/20
components.slider: Shadcn slider, colored track based on current value. Thumb has shadow-md.
components.9_box_grid: grid grid-cols-3 grid-rows-3 gap-2 aspect-square. Each cell rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-300.

motion.hover: Subtle transform -translate-y-[1px] and shadow-md on interactive cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
Implement a 2-column bento layout: left column for KPI and 360 evaluation inputs (use Shadcn sliders and numeric inputs), right column for the live 9-Box Grid preview.
The 9-Box Grid must be a CSS grid (3x3). Y-axis is Potential/360 Eval (0-100), X-axis is Performance/KPI (0-100).
Map the score to the grid: A (Top-Right, Green), B1-B4 (Adjacent to A, Yellow/Orange), C1-C4 (Bottom-Left, Orange/Red). Highlight the current cell dynamically as sliders move.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings; use Outfit (add it via Google Fonts if necessary).
Maintain the 'Linear/Notion' aesthetic: lots of whitespace, rounded-2xl cards, extremely soft shadows, subtle 1px gray borders.
Include data-testid attributes on all sliders, inputs, and buttons.
Add a profile banner at the top of the content area using the 'cover_banner' and 'employee_avatar' media URLs.
Implement manual override toggle for final classification.
Ensure all sliders have clear labels and current value displays.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for UI adornments.
